query:
INSERT INTO background_templates (name, description, templateType) VALUES
('Modern Gradient', 'Professional blue-purple gradient background', 'gradient_modern'),
('Sunset Gradient', 'Warm pink-red gradient for eye-catching ads', 'gradient_sunset'),
('Professional Solid', 'Clean navy blue solid background', 'solid_professional'),
('Premium Textured', 'Sophisticated dark background with subtle texture', 'textured_premium'),
('Branded Dealer', 'Customizable with your dealer brand color', 'branded_dealer'),
('Seasonal Special', 'Bright gold gradient for special promotions', 'seasonal_special')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
